key_predictive_features: Spot ETF flow direction (6-day outflow streak = $2.54B — strongest bearish signal)
Options max pain vs spot ($75K vs $73.1K — $1.9K gap = gravitational pull upward after expiry)
Fear & Greed Index (23 = Extreme Fear — historically contrarian BUY at 0.585 accuracy)
SOPR (0.98 = slight selling, holders realizing small losses)
NUPL (0.27 = 'Optimism' zone — not panic, not euphoria)
Funding rates (neutral-to-negative = shorts paying, cautious positioning)
CFTC perpetual futures approval (structural positive, no near-term price impact)
fundamental_drivers: PCE inflation at 3-year high — Fed repricing risk
NFP June 5 — strong = hawkish = BTC down, weak = dovish = BTC up
FOMC June 16-17 — no cut expected, guidance is the signal
Institutional flows: spot ETF turning net negative for first time YTD risk
MSTR 411 BTC transfer to Coinbase Prime — if Saylor selling, narrative shift

cross_asset_correlations.SPX_correlation: Decorrelated — equities at ATH, BTC ranging. Historically reconverges.
cross_asset_correlations.DXY_correlation: Moderate inverse — USD strength on hawkish Fed = BTC headwind
cross_asset_correlations.Gold_correlation: Low — gold up on geopolitics while BTC flat on ETF outflows
cross_asset_correlations.VIX_correlation: VIX 15.25 (low) = risk-on environment, but BTC not participating

seasonal_patterns: June historically weak for BTC (avg -1.2% monthly return)
Post-halving year 2 historically bullish but delayed (2017: H2 rally, 2021: H2 rally)
Options expiry gravitational pull typically resolves within 48-72 hours

recommended_new_signals.description: Track 5-day rolling net ETF flows. >$500M weekly outflow = SELL, >$500M inflow = BUY. Currently strongest single predictor.
Track distance between spot and max pain. >5% gap historically predicts reversion within 72h.
Track funding rate sign changes. Persistent negative = bottom forming. Persistent positive = top forming.

our_signal_performance.best: ADX regime switch (79.3% BTC-specific, per journal entries). This is our edge on BTC.
our_signal_performance.worst: Qwen3 BUY accuracy (33.2% all-time BTC). Effectively random on BUY side.
our_signal_performance.observation: BTC signal oscillation this week (8+ flips per day) confirms ranging market. Our system correctly held DORMANT/HOLD throughout.

key_predictive_features: Gold-silver ratio (currently ~60:1, compressing from 80:1 — bullish for silver)
Solar panel demand (125 Moz forecast 2026, +15% YoY — structural)
Central bank gold buying (190t Q1 2026 — silver follows gold with leverage)
COT speculative positioning (reducing longs = contrarian setup forming)
DXY strength (inverse correlation, USD weakness = silver bid)
ATR% (0.52% = very low volatility, compression often precedes breakout)
Copper substitution risk (Longi back-contact cells — medium-term headwind)
fundamental_drivers: Silver supply deficit: mine output declining, demand rising (solar + EV + AI data centers)
Iran deal binary risk: deal = risk-on = silver dip, no deal = safe haven bid
June seasonal weakness (historically worst month for silver)
NFP June 5 impact: strong = USD up = silver down, weak = USD down = silver up
Gold prophecy $120 at 0.8 conviction — 4/5 checkpoints triggered, 62.9% to target

cross_asset_correlations.XAU_correlation: Very high (0.85+). Gold leads, silver follows with 1.5-2x beta.
cross_asset_correlations.DXY_correlation: Strong inverse (-0.6 to -0.7). Key macro driver.
cross_asset_correlations.Oil_correlation: Low-moderate. Iran deal affects both via geopolitical channel.
cross_asset_correlations.SPY_correlation: Low. Silver more macro/commodity than equity-linked.

seasonal_patterns: June historically weakest month for silver (avg -2.1% return)
July-August seasonal bounce typical (monsoon/festival demand in India)
Q4 strong: jewelry demand + year-end portfolio rebalancing
FOMC volatility: silver typically sells off 3-5 days pre-FOMC, recovers post

recommended_new_signals.description: Track rate of G/S ratio change. Rapid compression historically = silver outperformance continuation. Already partially in metals_cross_asset but could be standalone.
SLV/SIVR inflows/outflows as sentiment indicator. Contrarian at extremes.
Track distance to next FOMC. -3 to -5 days = SELL (vol expansion), post-event = BUY (vol collapse). Already in econ_calendar but silver-specific tuning needed.

our_signal_performance.best: Williams VIX Fix (60.9% XAG-specific, 92 sam). Only active for XAG per-ticker override.
our_signal_performance.worst: Credit spread risk (disabled for XAG). EMA (14.7% at 1d, 34 sam — correctly disabled).
our_signal_performance.observation: XAG signal heatmap: mostly HOLD in ranging. 12h TF BUY has been the Patient add-trigger — correctly not met this week. Position is safe.
